chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-6278 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Hearing 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.26250/2025 3. For hearing of main case 04.02.2026. Mr. Bilawal Solangi, Advocate for the Petitioner --------------- Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the Department whereas counsel for the Petitioner states on instructions that this Petition is not being pressed any further. In view of such statement, the Petition stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
